chunks.text: University of California at Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences Instructional Support Group /share/b/pub/a2ps.help /share/b/pub/enscript.help July 31, 2006 'Enscript' is re

ipt.help July 31, 2006 'Enscript' is replaced by 'a2ps' -------------------------------- 'Enscript' and 'a2ps' convert text files to PostScript on UNIX computers. On EECS Solaris 10 computers, /usr/sww/bin/enscript has been replaced b

mputers, /usr/sww/bin/enscript has been replaced by /usr/sww/bin/a2ps. Examples: a2ps -r2 -P PRINTER # prints landsacpe, 2 pages per side PRINTER a2ps -DDuplex:true -P PRINTER # prints duplex to PRINTER Here are some common arguments to

ex to PRINTER Here are some common arguments to enscript and the equivalent in a2ps: enscript a2ps purpose ------------------- ------------------- ---------------------------- -d PRINTER -P PRINTER name of the printer -f Courier7 -

-P PRINTER name of the printer -f Courier7 -f Courier7 set font size -DDuplex:false -s 1 print single-sided -DDuplex:true -s 2 print double-sided -r -r print landscape -R -R print potrait -B -B print no header -

-R print potrait -B -B print no header -G -b print fancy header ------------------- ------------------- ---------------------------- Please see 'man -M /usr/sww/man a2ps' for more options. Instructional Su
options. Instructional Support Group 384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
